message:
fix: address bugs in handoff services from fresh-eyes review

- handoff-transfer.service.ts: Fix array mutation bug in rollbackTransfer()
  where completedTransfers.reverse() mutated the caller's array. Now uses
  spread operator [...completedTransfers].reverse() to avoid side effects.

- handoff-context.service.ts: Fix array handling in sanitizeWorkingMemory()
  which incorrectly treated arrays as objects, iterating over numeric
  indices as string keys. Now properly handles arrays by recursively
  sanitizing each element that is an object.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
